mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO RECALL_QUIZ_DISTRACT (quiz_no, validation, text) VALUES
( #{quizNo}, #{quiz.validation.code}, #{quiz.text} )
mapper.select:
SELECT REQ.quiz_no AS quizNo , REQ.member_no AS memberNo , REQ.question AS question , REQD.distract_no AS distractNo , REQD.validation AS validation , REQD.text AS text FROM RECALL_QUIZ REQ LEFT JOIN RECALL_QUIZ_DISTRACT REQD ON REQ.quiz_no = REQD.quiz_no
WHERE REQ.member_no = #{memberNo} AND REQ.deleted_dt IS NULL AND REQD.deleted_dt IS NULL
ORDER BY REQ.quiz_no DESC, REQD.distract_no ASC

SELECT REQ.quiz_no AS quizNo , REQ.member_no AS memberNo , REQ.question AS question , REQD.distract_no AS distractNo , REQD.validation AS validation , REQD.text AS text
FROM RECALL_QUIZ REQ
LEFT JOIN RECALL_QUIZ_DISTRACT REQD ON REQD.quiz_no = REQ.quiz_no
WHERE REQ.quiz_no = #{quizNo} AND REQ.deleted_dt IS NULL AND REQD.deleted_dt IS NULL
